<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardrot (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-cṳ̄]][[de:Erde-Ratte]][[fr:Rat de terre]][[hak:Vú-chṳ́]][[ja:戊子]][[ko:무자]][[nds:Eer-Rött]][[vi:Mậu Tý]][[za:Fouhceij]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-chú]][[zh-yue:戊子]][[zh:戊子]]

'''Yang Earth Rat''' (戊子, つちのえね、ぼどのねずみ、ぼどのね、ぼし, tsuchinoe-ne, bodo-no-nezumi, bodo-no-ze, boshi) is one element of the [[Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive]].

It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by [[Yin Fire Pig]] and followed by [[Yin Earth Ox]]. In the [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[Tsuchinoe (戊)]] of the [[Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yang earth, while the [[Rat (zodiac)|Rat (子)]] of the [[Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ([[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)]]; earth overcomes water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Rat (戊子)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùzǐ
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 zi2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-ne
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-ne
***Onyomi 1: boshi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muja (무자)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Tý

==Years of Yang Earth Rat==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 28 when divided by 60 is considered a Yang Earth Rat [[Year|year]].
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Year of Yang Earth Rat'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 28|28 AD]]
* [[AD 88|88 AD]]
* [[AD 148|148 AD]]
* [[208|208 AD]]
* [[268|268 AD]]
* [[328|328 AD]]
* [[388|388 AD]]
* [[448|448 AD]]
* [[508|508 AD]]
* [[568|568 AD]]
* [[628|628 AD]]
* [[688|688 AD]]
* [[748|748 AD]]
* [[AD 808|808 AD]]
* [[868|868 AD]]
* [[928|928 AD]]
* [[988|988 AD]]
|
* [[1048|1048 AD]]
* [[1108|1108 AD]]
* [[1168|1168 AD]]
* [[1228|1228 AD]]
* [[1288|1288 AD]]
* [[1348|1348 AD]]
* [[1408|1408 AD]]
* [[1468|1468 AD]]
* [[1528|1528 AD]]
* [[1588|1588 AD]]
* [[1648|1648 AD]]
* [[1708|1708 AD]]
* [[1768|1768 AD]]
* [[1828|1828 AD]]
* [[1888|1888 AD]]
* [[1948|1948 AD]]
|
* [[2008|2008 AD]]
* [[2068 AD]]
* [[22nd century]]
* [[22nd century]]
* [[23rd century]]
* [[24th century]]
* [[24th century]]
* [[2428 AD]]
* [[2488 AD]]
* [[2548 AD]]
* [[2608 AD]]
* [[2668 AD]]
* [[3rd millennium]]
* [[2788 AD]]
* [[2848 AD]]
* [[2908 AD]]
* [[2968 AD]]
|}

==Months of Yang Earth Rat==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are [[Kanoe (庚)]] or [[Kinoto (乙)]]), the month of [[November]] is considered the Yang Earth Rat [[Month|month (calendar)]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or on a seasonal month (from [[Daxue (solar term)|Taisetsu]] to the day before [[Xiaohan|Shōkan]]).

==Days of Yang Earth Rat==
The selection of auspicious days for Yang Earth Rat is as follows.
=== Selected Day ===
The Yang Earth Rat day is the 5th day of [[Ten directions]].
== See Also ==
{{wikidata link|Q1062052}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
